series_metadata.series_title: Original Bet Ticket Returns from Retailers
series_metadata.series_description: File contains the original winning ticket and pink claim (lower portion) transmittal copy received from the Lottery Retailers. The winning tickets are exchanged at the agent location for a Pay to Bearer negotiable instrument entitling the winner to collect their winnings. The winning tickets and Claim copies are filed in date-received order.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: digital copy in system seven (7) years ; Paper: hard copy in operating area claim is paid in full, scan into system
